questionHtml: Find the amount of antibiotic, in mg, that Ted receives on the fifth day.
markschemeHtml:
20 × (0.5)4      (M1)(A1)

Note: Award (M1) for substitution into the geometric sequence formula, (A1) for correct substitution.

1.25  (mg)       (A1)(G3)
